verbatim_text: And I told Yu, I'm going to Cornell. You're an undergrad. Tell me what to do. Then I talked to Jake. And I told Jake, by the way, to take you something I accepted an offer at Cornell, I'm going to take Matt with me. But it breaks my heart. And I can't take Yu with me. But I meant obviously it's him. But Jake actually suddenly burst into tears and was like, why? And I was like, I don't really know. It's not really possible, right? He was like, well, I'm taking Matt with you. I said, well, Matt is a PhD student. He was like, well, I'm a PhD student.
